accountSyncEnabled.description: Enable to sync settings across devices using the current account.
accountSyncEnabled.title: Account Sync

defaultLocalTerminalProfile.description: Default local terminal used when opening from context.
defaultLocalTerminalProfile.title: Default Local Terminal

defaultServerNoteTemplate.description: Automatically prefills this note for newly created servers.
defaultServerNoteTemplate.title: Default Server Note

devToolsEnabled.description: Allows UI debugging. This option is intended for advanced users and should be enabled with caution.
devToolsEnabled.title: Enable DevTools

sftpDeleteConfirmationMode.description: Controls when SFTP delete actions ask for confirmation before removing remote files or directories.
sftpDeleteConfirmationMode.title: Confirm Before Delete

sftpShowParentDirectoryEntry.description: Shows a ".." row at the top of the SFTP file list for navigating to the parent directory.
sftpShowParentDirectoryEntry.title: Show Parent Directory Row

showFullServerAddress.description: When disabled, server host/IP values in the server list are masked with asterisks.
showFullServerAddress.title: Show Full Server Address

sshConnectionTimeoutSec.description: Connection is automatically disconnected after timeout.
sshConnectionTimeoutSec.title: SSH Connection Timeout (sec)

sshMaxRows.description: Maximum retained terminal lines for SSH sessions.
sshMaxRows.title: SSH Max Rows

sshReconnectOnFocus.description: When enabled, switching to a disconnected SSH tab will automatically attempt to reconnect the session.
sshReconnectOnFocus.title: Auto-Reconnect on Tab Focus

sshTabApplyServerVisualStyle.description: Apply the selected server icon color and background style to SSH and SFTP tabs.
sshTabApplyServerVisualStyle.title: Apply Server Icon Colors To SSH And SFTP Tabs

terminalAltClickMovesCursor.description: Use Alt (Option on macOS) + click to move the cursor to the clicked position.
terminalAltClickMovesCursor.title: Alt/Option Click Moves Cursor

terminalAutoCompleteAcceptKeys.description: Controls which key applies the highlighted auto-complete suggestion.
terminalAutoCompleteAcceptKeys.title: Auto Complete Apply Shortcut

terminalAutoCompleteBuiltInCommandsEnabl.description: Include built-in command and option suggestions from command specs.
terminalAutoCompleteBuiltInCommandsEnabl.title: Auto Complete Built-in Command Suggestions

terminalAutoCompleteEnabled.description: Enable terminal command auto-complete suggestions while typing.
terminalAutoCompleteEnabled.title: Terminal Auto Complete

terminalAutoCompleteFuzzyMatch.description: Allow fuzzy matching in addition to strict prefix matching.
terminalAutoCompleteFuzzyMatch.title: Auto Complete Fuzzy Match

terminalAutoCompleteHistoryEnabled.description: Include command history suggestions in the auto-complete menu.
terminalAutoCompleteHistoryEnabled.title: Auto Complete History Suggestions

terminalAutoCompleteMaxItems.description: Maximum number of suggestions shown in the auto-complete menu.
terminalAutoCompleteMaxItems.title: Auto Complete Suggestion Limit

terminalAutoCompleteMinChars.description: Minimum number of typed characters before auto-complete is triggered.
terminalAutoCompleteMinChars.title: Auto Complete Trigger Length

terminalAutoCompletePasswordEnabled.description: Include interactive password fill suggestions when secure prompts are detected.
terminalAutoCompletePasswordEnabled.title: Auto Complete Password Suggestions

terminalAutoCompletePathEnabled.description: Include file and directory path suggestions in the auto-complete menu.
terminalAutoCompletePathEnabled.title: Auto Complete Path Suggestions

terminalAutoCompletePromptRegex.description: Optional regex for parsing prompt prefix before command text. Leave empty to use built-in heuristics.
terminalAutoCompletePromptRegex.title: Auto Complete Prompt Regex

terminalBracketedPasteEnabled.description: Wrap pasted text in safe paste markers so commands are not executed immediately.
terminalBracketedPasteEnabled.title: Safe Paste

terminalContextLaunchBehavior.description: Controls how terminals are opened from context launch or 'Open terminal in Cosmosh'.
terminalContextLaunchBehavior.title: Launch from Context

terminalCursorInactiveStyle.description: Sets how the cursor appears when the terminal is unfocused.
terminalCursorInactiveStyle.title: Cursor Inactive Style

terminalCursorStyle.description: Sets the cursor shape when terminal is focused.
terminalCursorStyle.title: Cursor Style

terminalCursorWidth.description: Cursor width in CSS pixels when cursor style is Bar. Leave empty to use default behavior.
terminalCursorWidth.title: Cursor Width

terminalCustomGlyphs.description: Render box drawing and block glyphs with custom renderer for better alignment.
terminalCustomGlyphs.title: Custom Glyphs

terminalDrawBoldTextInBrightColors.description: Render bold text using bright ANSI colors.
terminalDrawBoldTextInBrightColors.title: Bold Uses Bright ANSI Colors

terminalFastScrollSensitivity.description: Scrolling speed multiplier when fast scrolling is active (for example while holding Alt, or Option on macOS).
terminalFastScrollSensitivity.title: Fast Scroll Sensitivity

terminalFontFamily.placeholder: monospace, Consolas, "JetBrains Mono", "Liberation Mono", "Microsoft YaHei", "SFMono-Regular", "PingFang SC"
terminalFontFamily.title: Terminal Font Family

terminalFontWeight.description: Font weight for regular terminal text, such as normal or 400.
terminalFontWeight.title: Terminal Font Weight

terminalFontWeightBold.description: Font weight for bold terminal text, such as bold or 700.
terminalFontWeightBold.title: Terminal Bold Font Weight

terminalLineHeight.description: Line height multiplier used by terminal rendering.
terminalLineHeight.title: Terminal Line Height

terminalMinimumContrastRatio.description: Minimum text contrast ratio. Use 1 to disable dynamic adjustment.
terminalMinimumContrastRatio.title: Minimum Contrast Ratio

terminalScreenReaderMode.description: Enable screen-reader support in the terminal.
terminalScreenReaderMode.title: Screen Reader Mode

terminalScrollOnUserInput.description: Auto-scroll to the bottom when user input is sent.
terminalScrollOnUserInput.title: Scroll On User Input

terminalScrollSensitivity.description: Base scrolling speed multiplier for wheel scrolling.
terminalScrollSensitivity.title: Scroll Sensitivity

terminalSelectionBarEnabled.description: Show Orbit Bar when text is selected in terminal sessions.
terminalSelectionBarEnabled.title: Orbit Bar

terminalSelectionSearchEngine.description: Defines which search engine is used for web search.
terminalSelectionSearchEngine.title: Search Engine

terminalSelectionSearchUrlTemplate.description: Sets a custom search engine URL. Use QUERY_TOKEN as the search placeholder.
terminalSelectionSearchUrlTemplate.title: Custom Search URL

terminalSmoothScrollDuration.description: Smooth scrolling duration in milliseconds. Set 0 to disable.
terminalSmoothScrollDuration.title: Smooth Scroll Duration

terminalTabStopWidth.description: Tab stop width in terminal cells.
terminalTabStopWidth.title: Tab Stop Width

terminalTextDropMode.description: Controls when drag-and-drop text insertion into terminal is enabled.
terminalTextDropMode.title: Drag To Terminal

theme.description: Controls the color theme used in the interface.
theme.title: Theme

userMenuDebugEntryEnabled.description: Show the Debug entry in the user menu. Intended for development and advanced diagnostics.
userMenuDebugEntryEnabled.title: Show Debug Entry In User Menu
